headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Micron Technology, Raises Price Target to $525

headline: Oil at $103, Adobe in Freefall, and a Market That Just Can't Catch a Break
summary: Wall Street closed out a brutal week on Friday, March 13, with oil prices near three-year highs, a CEO shock at Adobe, and fresh macroeconomic data painting an uncomfortable picture of slowing growth and stubborn inflation.

headline: 5 Stock Picks Last Week From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts
summary: Benzinga's Analyst Ratings API is a collection of the highest-quality stock ratings curated by the Benzinga news desk via direct partnerships with major sell-side banks. Benzinga displays overnight ratings changes on a daily basis three hours prior to the U.S. equity market opening. Data specialists at investment dashboard provider Toggle.ai recently uncovered that the analyst insights Benzinga Pro subscribers and Benzinga readers regularly receive can successfully be used as trading indicators to outperform the stock market.

headline: Micron Seals Taiwan Fab Deal, Eyes AI-Driven Memory Boom
summary: Micron acquires PSMC's Tongluo fab to boost DRAM and HBM output in Taiwan. Learn how this site fuels Micron's global AI chip expansion.

raw.headline: Micron Seals Taiwan Fab Deal, Eyes AI-Driven Memory Boom

headline: Micron plans second chip facility at newly acquired Taiwan site
summary: U.S. memory chipmaker Micron ‌Technology said on Monday ‌it plans to build a ​second manufacturing facility in Taiwan at the Tongluo site it recently acquired from ‌Powerchip ⁠Semiconductor Manufacturing Corp. The new facility will help ⁠it expand supply of leading-edge DRAM products including ​high-bandwidth memory (HBM) ​to ​support surging AI ‌demand, the company said. Micron also said it has completed the acquisition of PSMC's Tongluo P5 site and ‌the new ​second facility would ​be ​of similar scale ‌to the existing fab ​in ​Miaoli County.

headline: Micron Taiwan Fab Deal Ties AI DRAM Growth To Rich Valuation
summary: Micron Technology completed its acquisition of Powerchip Semiconductor Manufacturing Corporation’s P5 fab site in Taiwan. The facility is intended to support advanced DRAM production aimed at growing AI memory demand. Micron plans to retrofit existing cleanroom space immediately and pursue additional construction by the end of fiscal 2026. For investors watching Micron Technology (NasdaqGS: MU), this move comes as the stock trades around $426.13, with very large 1 year and 3 year returns...
